scripts.dev:desktop: npm run sync-shared && npm run build:desktop-dist && echo 'Run cargo tauri dev from packages/desktop/src-tauri/'
scripts.dev:extension: npm run sync-shared && echo 'Load packages/extension/ in Chrome'
scripts.test:extension: npm run sync-shared && cd packages/extension && npm test
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --all --src packages/shared/lib --src packages/shared/views --src packages/desktop/src node --test packages/shared/tests/*.test.js packages/desktop/tests/*.test.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:format
scripts.lint:js: eslint packages/shared/ packages/extension/sidepanel/ packages/extension/content/ packages/extension/background/ packages/desktop/src/ scripts/
